notes: Full mini-game in one HTML file. Canvas lawn + HTML/CSS overlay UI. Sun economy (sky drops + Sunflower), 4 plants (Sunflower/Peashooter/Wall-nut/Cherry Bomb) with cost+cooldown cards, 3 zombies (basic/cone/bucket) with armor + hp bars, lawnmowers, 10 escalating waves (every 3rd = Huge Wave), main menu / How-to / leaderboard (localStorage top 5) / pause / game-over / victory with name entry, synthesized SFX (muted by default).
